case_title: SQUERI,ROBERT VS PESSAGNO,G. PETER -FRANK'S SHOE REPAIR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY SQUERI,ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT PESSAGNO,G. PETER -FRANK'S SHOE REPAIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO G. PETER PESSAGNO RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SQUERI,ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PESSAGNO,G. PETER -FRANK'S SHOE REPAIR $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $320.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
